description: Intraday message: 'quiero añadir cardio al programa'. Then next-day morning brief. Critical: WEEKLY_INTENT/ANNUAL_ARC must NOT change before user confirms. Morning brief must NOT mention cardio.

coach_state.GOLDEN_RULES: {"rules": ["Build strength and muscle", "Health and longevity", "No injury grinding"], "override_log": []}

mock_llm_responses.program_agent_0: {"decision": "PENDING_USER_CLARIFICATION", "reasoning": "Cardio addition could align with health/longevity rule but needs specifics. Zone 2 2x/week is different from daily running. Asking for clarification before any program change.", "response_to_athlete": "Interesante. ¿Estás pensando en Zone 2 (2x/semana, 30min) o algo más intenso como correr daily? Antes de modificar el programa necesito entender el volumen.", "pending_proposal": {"type": "cardio_addition", "status": "AWAITING_USER_CLARIFICATION", "details": "User wants to add cardio — type and volume TBD"}}
mock_llm_responses.morning_brief_0: Today is Day 2 — Deadlift + OHP. Target RPE 7.5. Focus on hip hinge on deadlifts.

assertions.msg: No program-level domains should change before user confirms cardio addition

expected_flaws: If ANNUAL_ARC or WEEKLY_INTENT was modified: agent auto-approved cardio without user confirmation — pre-confirm guard for program changes is missing
If morning_brief LLM call (morning_brief_0) system_preview contains 'cardio': pending cardio request leaked into morning brief context — context isolation failure in _build_bot_context()
